title: Tumblin’ Monkeys Kids Game with Monkey Game Pieces, Sticks and Game Unit, Easy-to-Learn, Makes a Great Gift for 5 Year Olds and Up, 52563
features: This Tumblin' Monkeys Game is so easy to learn and fun to play that both parents and kids will go ape for it!
Create a web of sticks and place the monkeys inside the tree.
Then roll the die and take turns removing one stick at a timewhichever color stick the die indicates.
Don't let the monkeys fall down the tree on your turn or you'll have to add them to your pile!
The player to drop the fewest monkeys wins!
description: From the manufacturer A monkey fun for quiet hands! Who manages to leave the monkeys in the palm tree where they belong? Pull the sticks slowly and carefully out of the tree. Are the monkeys moved and slide? Caution! The opponent should fall down more monkeys! Fun for all ages! Reading instructions are not required, the game can start right away! Ideal for younger children. What does the packaging contain? Includes a bright yellow transparent palm tree that allows you to see the monkeys to be saved from slipping. Also: 30 monkeys, 30 sticks in 3 colours, 1 dice.
